---
title: "about_page_1"
author: "Edward"
date: "2024-04-02"
output: html_document
---

The **_N-R Mal App_** addresses the following objectives:
1. Dynamic Analysis: Explore regional and national dynamic patterns and trends in malaria cases and climatic variables.
2. Regional and National Specific Insights: Analyse data at the both the national and regional levels of Ghana to understand malaria and climatic variations across different areas.
3. Modeling Techniques: Use advanced statistical model (**__GAM__**) to predict and forecast malaria cases and assess climatic impact under various scenarios.
